data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0` using:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The build and test discovery succeeded for `net9.0` only (no `net8.0` run). The "no test is available" message just means the project doesn't contain any test methods yet — once you add tests, they'll execute on `net9.0` only with this command.
